no: Beyond the Law - Kova Kiyone Kiyone is a LG Female Ranger (Archer) and Kova is a CG Male Half-Elf Mage/Thief.Install Beyond the Law before Neh’taniel NPC for BG2. REINSTALL BUG: portraits%ee_file% unresolved on reinstall — same ALWAYS block variable issue as Saradas. First install succeeds. Affects reinstall cycles only.
sum: Adds a law-enforcement themed quest mod with a joinable NPC. Investigate crimes and make justice-themed moral choices in BG2.

co.n: Beyond the Law with Kiyone original sound set
